name: Black Scorpion Stingmace
description:
The massive stinger of a black scorpion adds significant weight to this +2 greater striking mace. On a critical hit, the target is exposed to black scorpion venom.

Black Scorpion Venom (poison)

Saving Throw

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 ] damage and Clumsy 2 (1 round)

Stage 2 ] damage, clumsy 2, and Slowed 1 (1 round)

Stage 3 ] damage, Clumsy 4, and Slowed 2 (1 round).

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include the intact stinger of a black scorpion.
